notes: The player's jump sound (R-SYS-006): a DCC-imported clip (R-ASSET-001) routed to the Sound Effects bus (game-mix.audio-bus.json id 5a08393cca219c68), triggered at the player's position each time the control system applies a grounded jump, attenuated by listener distance. Fired on miniaudio's NULL backend in the headless smoke gate, off the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001).
